summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because closure/comment/label are blocked by job frontmatter, and no PR has the complete merge preflight required for merge recommendation. #90979 has a narrow repair path; the others need maintainer judgment or author follow-up before Clownfish should proceed.

actions.reason: Feature/provider work touches auth-provider and session-state surfaces, has failing checks, and is labeled waiting on author. This requires maintainer/author resolution before repair or merge planning.
Narrow contributor branch with a concrete failing check repair path. Clownfish should repair the contributor branch, preserve author credit, run validation, then perform merge preflight.
Despite passing checks, the PR is labeled waiting on author and changes message-delivery startup behavior. The unresolved author-followup state requires maintainer judgment before merge or repair.

Technically close to merge-ready, but merge policy requires hydrated comments/review-bot state and a passed Codex /review. Because #91000 and #91013 both touch gateway abort/chat behavior, maintainer sequencing judgment is needed unless a refreshed preflight clears both.
The PR is clean in checks but broad across gateway abort state surfaces and overlaps #91000. It needs maintainer sequencing/review judgment plus the required Codex /review preflight before merge.
Emit an executable fix artifact for the one narrow PR whose blocker is a concrete failing check and whose branch is editable.

needs_human: #90975: waiting-on-author feature/provider PR with failing checks and auth/session-risk labels.
#90989: waiting-on-author message-delivery startup recovery PR; comments were not hydrated to clear the author-followup state.
#91000 and #91013: both are clean, related gateway abort/chat PRs, but need maintainer sequencing judgment and required Codex /review/comment preflight before merge.
